title: Bionano Q1 2026 results call set for May 13
text: Bionano Genomics announced that it will report its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 13, 2026, after market close. The company will host an earnings call and webcast on May 13, 2026, at 4:45 p.m. ET. The call will be available live via webcast at www.bionanogenomics.com, and participants can register in advance. A replay of the call will be available for 90 days following the broadcast. Expected topics on the call include Q1 2026 financial results, business update, commentary on reimbursement developments, discussion of OGM utilization trends, and 2026 guidance. Investors should review the company's recent 8-K filings and investor presentations for additional context on strategic initiatives and financial metrics.
